description: Web analytics platform schema for tracking user interactions, sessions, profiles, and product catalog. Designed for ClickHouse with advanced column types.

tables.name: analytics.events
tables.description: Clickstream events capturing every user interaction on the platform. Highest-volume table, partitioned by month.

columns.name: event_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each event, auto-generated

columns.name: session_id
columns.description: Session identifier linking events within a single user visit

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Foreign key to users.user_id; NULL for anonymous visitors

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: Category of the user interaction

columns.name: page_url
columns.description: Full URL of the page where the event occurred

columns.name: referrer
columns.description: HTTP referrer URL; empty string when direct traffic

columns.name: device_type
columns.description: Device category: desktop, mobile, or tablet

columns.name: browser
columns.description: Browser name (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari)

columns.name: os
columns.description: Operating system (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android)

columns.name: country
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the visitor

columns.name: city
columns.description: City name derived from IP geolocation; may be empty

columns.name: properties
columns.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the event (e.g., button_id, page_section, product_id)

columns.name: timestamp
columns.description: Event timestamp with millisecond precision

columns.name: duration_ms
columns.description: Time in milliseconds the user spent on the page before this event

columns.name: is_bounce
columns.description: 1 if this was the only event in the session, 0 otherwise

tables.name: analytics.users
tables.description: Registered user profiles including subscription plan, tags, lifetime value, and preference settings.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Unique numeric identifier for the user

columns.name: email
columns.description: User email address

columns.name: name
columns.description: Full display name

columns.name: signup_date
columns.description: Calendar date when the user created their account

columns.name: plan
columns.description: Current subscription tier

columns.name: country
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code

columns.name: tags
columns.description: Free-form labels applied to the user (e.g., premium, early_adopter, newsletter)

columns.name: lifetime_value
columns.description: Total revenue attributed to this user in USD

columns.name: last_active
columns.description: Timestamp of the user's most recent activity

columns.name: preferences
columns.description: User preference settings as key-value pairs (e.g., theme, language, timezone)

tables.name: analytics.sessions
tables.description: Aggregated session records derived from raw clickstream events. Each row represents a contiguous browsing session from a single device.

columns.name: session_id
columns.description: Unique session identifier (UUID string)

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Foreign key to users.user_id; NULL for anonymous sessions

columns.name: start_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the session began, millisecond precision

columns.name: end_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the session ended; NULL if still active or unknown

columns.name: duration_seconds
columns.description: Total session duration in seconds

columns.name: page_count
columns.description: Number of distinct pages viewed during the session

columns.name: device_type
columns.description: Device category: desktop, mobile, or tablet

columns.name: browser
columns.description: Browser name

columns.name: os
columns.description: Operating system

columns.name: country
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code

columns.name: entry_page
columns.description: URL of the first page visited in the session

columns.name: exit_page
columns.description: URL of the last page visited; empty if same as entry

columns.name: utm_source
columns.description: UTM source parameter from the landing URL; NULL when absent

columns.name: utm_medium
columns.description: UTM medium parameter; NULL when absent

columns.name: utm_campaign
columns.description: UTM campaign parameter; NULL when absent

columns.name: is_converted
columns.description: 1 if the session included a purchase event, 0 otherwise

tables.name: analytics.products
tables.description: Product catalog referenced by purchase events. Includes pricing, categorization, ratings, and descriptive tags.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique numeric product identifier

columns.name: name
columns.description: Product display name

columns.name: category
columns.description: Top-level product category (e.g., Electronics, Clothing, Books)

columns.name: subcategory
columns.description: Finer-grained product subcategory (e.g., Smartphones, Jackets)

columns.name: price
columns.description: Unit price in USD

columns.name: tags
columns.description: Descriptive tags for search and filtering (e.g., bestseller, new_arrival, sale)

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: 1 if currently available for sale, 0 if delisted

columns.name: rating
columns.description: Average customer rating on a 0.0 to 5.0 scale

columns.name: review_count
columns.description: Total number of customer reviews

relationships.description: Each event belongs to exactly one session
Each event may be attributed to a registered user
Each session may be attributed to a registered user
